Changelog:
- gethiddenproperty does not throw errors on write-only properties anymore
- decompiler improvements & added support for luau bytecode version 7
- fixed getconnections crash in myriad
- cloneref gc thing in myriad is now fixed
- ui now saves scripts, new autoexec tab feature, and layout improvements, new server joiner feature
- added openfiledialog, openfilesdialog, openfolderdialog, savefiledialog
(check https://github.com/Standard-2/Myriad/issues/18 for usage examples)
